creator: lucas.kanashiro@collabora.com
text:
Created attachment 202823
Patch to update to version 1.5.0

After some testing I found a bug in my last update, then I decided to import the latest upstream version (1.5.0) which simplifies the maintenance of the package (removing all the patches already applied by upstream). I am also taking over the maintainership of this packages as I discussed with Helen.
